generated_exposure.exposure_text: New report shows that while we spend billions on alliances, our own border security systems are outdated. Experts warn that without modernizing our domestic defenses first, we're leaving ourselves vulnerable. Time to prioritize real security at home before writing more checks overseas. #NationalSecurityFirst
